description: Stores raw Intercom conversation data collected daily. Retention: 90 days.

columns.name: transcript
columns.note: Full formatted conversation, one message per line: [timestamp] ROLE: message

columns.name: status
columns.note: closed | re-opened. Re-opened triggers re-analysis in WF2.

columns.name: intercom_link
columns.note: Direct URL to conversation in Intercom inbox

columns.name: is_bot_handled
columns.note: TRUE if no human agent replied — conversation was fully handled by bot (Intercom Fin or custom bot)

columns.name: language
columns.note: ISO 639-1 language code detected by Claude during WF2 analysis (ar, de, el, en, fi, fr, it, no, pt). Null until analyzed.
